Changelog
=========

*   Update to 3.19.0


QA
==

portlint: OK
poudriere: OK -- testport on 13.2-RELEASE amd64 w/py38, py39, py310 (default), and py311 
SelfTest: OK -- test suite passes w/ security/py-pycryptodome-test-vectors 1.0.13, math/gmp installed, each version of Python in the ports tree


Note
====

Updating this port also updates security/py-cryptodomex
